name: Cleanaway Waste Management Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$2.3511. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$2.3893 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$2.3511, stop A$2.1681, target A$2.4065. Risk/reward is 0.30:1.
